channel.title: Project_td on CEDIS
channel.description: Recent content in Project_td on CEDIS

item.title: Digital Transformation Project
item.description: The Brazilian Federal Government’s Public Services Digital Transformation project involves research, development, and innovation in methodologies, models, and tools that promote the automation and digitalization of public services.

item.title: George Marsicano Corrêa
item.description: Professor at the University of Brasília (UnB), working in the Software Engineering undergraduate program and the Graduate Program in Applied Computing with a focus on requirements, human aspects, and software engineering education.
